---
title: "Module 3 Slides — Model Evaluation & Resampling"
subtitle: "Measuring what actually generalizes"
description: "A visual overview of Ch. 9–10 — metrics, cross-validation, and why resampling gives more trustworthy performance estimates than a single test set."
author: "Jae Jung"
date: today
---

## About These Slides

This deck gives you a big-picture overview of Module 3 before you work
through the full codebook. Think of it as the map, not the territory —
covering the two-chapter arc at a conceptual level with just enough code
to orient you.

Work through these slides **before** the Codebook. They take about
15–20 minutes at your own pace.

---

## What the Slides Cover

**Part 1 — Judging Model Effectiveness (Ch. 9)**

- Why metrics matter — there is no single "best" metric
- Regression metrics: RMSE, R², MAE and when to use each
- The confusion matrix — reading TP, FP, FN, TN
- Binary classification: sensitivity, specificity, precision, accuracy
- The accuracy trap with imbalanced classes
- ROC curve and AUC — a threshold-free view of model discrimination
- Multiclass metrics and averaging strategies

**Part 2 — Resampling for Evaluating Performance (Ch. 10)**

- The resubstitution problem — why training-set metrics are optimistic
- Why you should not reuse the test set repeatedly
- V-fold cross-validation — structure, stratification, fold visualization
- Other resampling methods: repeated CV, bootstrap, validation split
- `fit_resamples()` — fitting and scoring across all folds
- Comparing single test-set vs. cross-validated estimates
- Reading fold-to-fold variability in ROC AUC

---

## Open the Slides

::: {.callout-tip}
The slides open in a **new tab** as a full-screen presentation.
Use arrow keys to advance. Press **F** for full screen and **Esc** to exit.
:::

```{=html}
<a href="we03_eval_resamp_slides.html"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   style="
     display: inline-block;
     margin-top: 0.5rem;
     padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
     background-color: #B8860B;
     color: white;
     font-weight: 600;
     font-size: 1rem;
     border-radius: 6px;
     text-decoration: none;
   "
>
  ▶ Open Slide Deck in New Tab
</a>
```

---

## Key R Functions in the Slides

| Function | Package | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `metric_set()` | `yardstick` | Bundle multiple metrics together |
| `conf_mat()` | `yardstick` | Build a confusion matrix |
| `sens()`, `spec()`, `precision()` | `yardstick` | Classification metrics |
| `roc_curve()`, `roc_auc()` | `yardstick` | ROC curve and AUC |
| `vfold_cv()` | `rsample` | Build cross-validation folds |
| `bootstraps()` | `rsample` | Bootstrap resampling |
| `fit_resamples()` | `tune` | Fit and score across resamples |
| `collect_metrics()` | `tune` | Extract averaged metrics |
| `collect_predictions()` | `tune` | Extract out-of-fold predictions |
